que: What is an event in JavaScript?
options: Something that happens in the browser and can trigger code

que: Which method is commonly used to listen for events?
Which event is commonly used for button presses?
What does event.preventDefault() do in a form submit handler?
options: Stops the browser’s default submit behavior

que: Which is a good event-handling practice?
options: Put every action in one huge callback
Prevent default behavior all the time
